race.comment: ENJOY LIFE (2) stretched his unbeaten run to three when he came from the back row to score four weeks ago at Launceston, getting home by a head. Kept up to the mark with a trial since and the much better draw gives him every chance to deliver again. LOUGLE (3) locked wheels and broke last start so that result can be forgiven. Won twice in a row prior and draws well so is worth another chance. Include along with PREPARATION (1) who hasn't raced since falling in November but he is unbeaten here and gets the ace draw.
